meta.description: Linux Log Guardian — WAF nginx open source hecho en Turquía. log → ban en ~15 min.
hero.title: Linux Log Guardian
hero.tag: nginx access log → WAF/CRS → ban en kernel · cadena única · self-hosted
about.title: Acerca de — Linux Log Guardian
site.purpose: Sitio público de presentación y descarga. Contenido estático: resumen, guía de instalación, pruebas y contacto. Log Guardian no se ejecuta aquí — lo instalas en tu propio servidor Linux.
about.body:
Linux Log Guardian es una pila de seguridad open source (MIT) self-hosted, desarrollada en Turquía. Una cadena: leer logs nginx → reglas OWASP CRS → ban a nivel kernel.

Proyecto comunitario independiente — revisión de código, personalización y hosting on-prem sin bloqueo cloud.

  • Código transparente; contribuciones bienvenidas
  • Binario: log-guardian · paquete: log-guardian_*.deb
  • Core solo listo para producción (~15 min)
  • Dashboard, Grafana, fleet = capa Pro opcional
flow.title: Cadena única: del log al ban en kernel
flow.note: XDR, marketplace Wasm y LLM Copilot son capas opcionales a largo plazo — Core solo es suficiente en producción.
scope.honest.title: Honest limits (not competing on edge speed)
scope.honest.body:
• Reactive architecture — first request may pass until the log line is parsed; we are not inline ModSec throughput.
  • No L3/L4 DDoS absorb — use CDN/Cloudflare on top.
  • Distributed botnets — per-IP ban; no CrowdSec signal network.
  • We do: log → CRS/WAF → ~17 ms kernel ban, proof PDF, Telegram ops, MIT self-hosted.
install.title: Guía de instalación (detallada)
install.intro: Instalación de producción paso a paso en Ubuntu/Debian. Funciona sin XDP en laptop o VM VirtualBox. Docs: docs/QUICKSTART_NGINX.md y docs/LAPTOP_OPS.md.
install.deb_body:
No compile step. Ships binaries, systemd, rules and scripts. Upgrade-safe: existing /etc/log-guardian/rules.conf is preserved.

Download: GitHub Releases (log-guardian_*_amd64.deb) or build from repo: bash scripts/build_deb.sh → dist/.
install.deb_s1_body: Install Debian package dependencies on first setup. nginx can be added in the same command if missing.
install.block_deb_deps:
sudo apt-get update
sudo apt-get install -y ipset libbpf1 libcurl4 libpcre2-8-0 libsqlite3-0 \
  libssl3 libelf1 libz1 liburing2 nginx
install.out_deb_deps:
Reading package lists... Done
Setting up ipset (7.x) ...
Setting up libbpf1:amd64 ...
Setting up nginx (1.x) ...
install.deb_s2_body: If dpkg -i reports missing dependencies, run apt-get install -f. postinst creates the log-guardian user, permissions and services automatically.
install.block_deb:
# Copy .deb to server (scp, wget, USB...)
sudo dpkg -i log-guardian_*_amd64.deb
sudo apt-get install -f   # if dependencies missing

# On success:
#   log-guardian kuruldu.
#   sudo bash .../install_first_run.sh
#   bash .../post_install_verify.sh
install.out_deb:
Selecting previously unselected package log-guardian.
(Reading database ... 100%)
Setting up log-guardian (72e5a7b) ...
[deb_post_install] rules.conf olusturuldu: /etc/log-guardian/rules.conf

log-guardian kuruldu.
install.deb_s3_body: Prepares nginx log format, FP trust and API security in one pass. Scripts live under /usr/local/share/log-guardian/scripts/.
install.out_deb_first:
[OK] log-guardian.service active
[OK] log-guardian-daemon.service active
[OK] --health IPC
[OK] API fail-closed (tokensiz 403)

=== ozet ===
  FAIL: 0   WARN: 0
[OK] post_install_verify — kurulum kapisi gecti
install.src_body: Clone from GitHub and build locally. Best for development and full source review.
install.req_body:
• Ubuntu 22.04 / 24.04 o Debian 12 (amd64)
  • nginx con access log escribible
  • root/sudo (systemd, ipset, /etc/log-guardian)
  • Pro opcional: Docker (dashboard/Grafana), kernel adecuado para eBPF
install.s1_body: Clonar, compilar y ejecutar el instalador principal. install.sh configura systemd, reglas y formato de log nginx.
install.block1:
git clone https://github.com/kurtulusutkucenik/Linux-Log-Guardian.git
cd Linux-Log-Guardian
make -j$(nproc)
sudo bash install.sh
install.s2_body: Inicia servicios y prepara la sincronización del token API para el dashboard.
install.block_api:
sudo bash scripts/install_first_run.sh
sudo bash scripts/ensure_api_security.sh
bash scripts/sync_dashboard_api_token.sh
install.s3_body: El WAF necesita el formato log_guardian para body y XFF. El instalador suele aplicarlo — verificar:
install.block_nginx:
# examples/nginx-log-guardian.conf → site config
STRICT=1 bash scripts/check_nginx_log_format.sh
sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx
install.s4_body: Comprobar salud, alarmas y métricas Prometheus. post_install_verify.sh resume en laptop.
install.block_verify:
sudo log-guardian --health
sudo log-guardian --status
# Source install:
bash scripts/post_install_verify.sh
# .deb install:
bash /usr/local/share/log-guardian/scripts/post_install_verify.sh
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9091/metrics | head
install.out_health:
[HEALTH] daemon IPC: OK
[HEALTH] BPF xdp=OFF execve=OFF lineage=OFF
[HEALTH] RCE det=0 kill=0 lineage=0 connect=0 uptime=…s
install.out_verify:
[OK] log-guardian.service active
[OK] metrics :9091
[OK] API fail-closed (tokensiz 403)
[OK] nginx log_guardian format

=== ozet ===
  FAIL: 0   WARN: 0
[OK] post_install_verify — kurulum kapisi gecti
install.s5_body: Sin eBPF/XDP usar --no-xdp con bans ipset. Si falla el servicio, script de reparación.
install.block2:
sudo bash install.sh --no-xdp
sudo bash scripts/install_first_run.sh
# if service FAIL:
sudo bash scripts/repair_no_xdp_stack.sh
install.tip: Consejo: JWT: bash scripts/laptop_jwt_setup.sh. Demo rápida: SKIP_WEBHOOK=1 bash scripts/demo_3min.sh
dashboard.title: Dashboard — tras instalar (Pro opcional)
dashboard.where: Importante: el dashboard no corre en este sitio. localhost:3001 está en tu máquina Linux donde instalaste — el localhost del visitante no es tu servidor.
dashboard.body: Dashboard Pro (Next.js): estado de fleet, historial de bans, tests y PDFs de prueba. Escucha en :3001 con TLS. Endurecer con laptop_harden.sh antes de exponer a internet.
dashboard.access_row1: Lee esta página, descarga fuente o .deb — no abre el puerto 3001.
dashboard.access_row2: Tras install.sh + dashboard_dev.sh en Ubuntu/Debian: http://localhost:3001 en la misma máquina.
dashboard.access_row3: Túnel SSH o (si firewall) https://SERVER_IP:3001. No exponer con contraseña demo.
dashboard.req_body:
• Core solo necesita nginx + sudo — dashboard no requerido
  • Dashboard: Docker + dashboard_dev.sh
  • Grafana: además grafana_stack.sh (opcional)
dashboard.start:
# On the machine where you installed (not this website):
bash scripts/dashboard_dev.sh
# Browser on the same machine:
#   http://localhost:3001
# Login: admin / DASHBOARD_ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env
dashboard.features:
• Fleet: agent online/offline, alarmas recientes
  • Tests: phase100, competitive-proof, bench
  • Informes: paquete PDF/JSON
  • Grafana: métricas tenant via bash scripts/grafana_provision.sh
dashboard.optional: ¿Core basta? Sí. Solo log → WAF → ban kernel sin dashboard. CLI (log-guardian --status) y Prometheus (:9091/metrics) vienen con Core.
dashboard.preview_note: Capturas abajo: ejemplos. UI en vivo solo en tu instalación.
dashboard.note: Resumen: este sitio = descargar y aprender. Dashboard = en tu servidor, tras instalar, opcional.
warn.title: ⚠️ Antes de exponer a internet
warn.p2: VPS público: sudo env LG_NEW_PASSWORD='…' bash scripts/laptop_harden.sh
layers.title: Capas
layers.note: Pro y capas opcionales son extensiones; Core basta para el uso diario.
github.title: Source code (GitHub)
github.intro: Linux Log Guardian is fully open source (MIT). All C source, install scripts, tests and evidence are on GitHub — you install on your own Linux server; this site is only a landing page.
github.steps_body: Clone, build, install; aim for FAIL: 0 in post_install_verify. Step-by-step: Setup · proofs: Tests.
github.contrib: Issues and pull requests welcome. Do not commit API/Telegram secrets — use ensure_api_security.sh and webhook.local.env.example on install.
download.title: Descargar (paquete .deb)
evidence.title: Paquete de pruebas
tests.title: Validation tests
tests.page_intro: Same matrix as dashboard /tests — install gates, CRS parity, FP, ban latency, corpus recall and 72h soak. Each card is automated script output.
tests.teaser: Same automated test matrix as the dashboard — 28 proofs (install gates, CRS, FP, ban latency, corpus, 72h soak).
tests.intro: Same automated test matrix as the dashboard — install gates (FAIL=0), CRS parity, FP, ban latency, corpus recall and 72h VPS/VM soak. Live installs refresh the same data at dashboard /tests.
tests.note: Raw JSON: competitive-proof.json · PDF: competitive-proof.pdf · Refresh: bash scripts/competitive_proof.sh
laptop.title: Matriz de validación laptop
laptop.intro: Gate dev rápido: sprint gate, soak 1h y demo 3 min. Soak 72h VM: laptop_soak_72h.sh --start.
laptop.block:
SKIP_PHASE100=1 bash scripts/laptop_sprint_gate.sh
SOAK_1H=1 bash scripts/laptop_soak_72h.sh --start
SKIP_WEBHOOK=1 bash scripts/demo_3min.sh
contact.title: Contacto y contribuciones
contact.body: Preguntas, colaboración o contribuciones — escríbenos. Bugs y pull requests bienvenidos.
footer: Linux Log Guardian · Hecho en Turquía · MIT · open source · kurtulusutkucenikcontact@gmail.com
